narrative:
North Royalton City has 21,444 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.6% D−R vs -6.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
